== Notes for [[Item:Q105703|Q105703]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

'''He had 8 sons.'''

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ja'far_ibn_Ab%C4%AB_T%C4%81lib

Source 2: http://www.yazehra.com/fatimabint.htm
--------------------
* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:4410847186200073281

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
